title: Case 102: Something Lifted This Child From His Yard...
description: In 1977, witnesses watched a massive winged creature carry a 10-year-old boy through the Illinois sky. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 102: Something Lifted This Child From His Yard...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: July 25th, 1977. Lawndale, Illinois. Multiple witnesses. One impossible event. What kind of bird has a 12-foot wingspan and the strength to lift a human child? Subscribe for more classified cases from the Department of the Unknown.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
A bird lifted a 10-year-old boy three feet off the ground in 1977. Multiple witnesses watched as the creature with a 12-foot wingspan held Marlon Lowe suspended in its talons before dropping him unharmed. Police confirmed an unidentified bird was spotted flying at impossibly low altitude.

#horror #scary #paranormal #mystery #creepy #fyp #cryptid #thunderbird #unexplained #truecrime #storytime #Illinois

instagram_metadata.reels_caption:
What kind of bird can lift a 10-year-old child three feet off the ground? In 1977, witnesses in Lawndale, Illinois watched exactly that happen when a massive creature with a 12-foot wingspan grabbed Marlon Lowe from his yard. The boy was held suspended for several seconds before being released.
